option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/introduction1" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="36sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/activate_button" android:layout_width="@dimen/activate_button_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/activate_button_size" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/activate_button_margin_top" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white_mod" android:text="@string/activate" app:strokeWidth="5dp" app:strokeColor="#AAA" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/activate_button_size">
<RelativeLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_centerInParent="true" android:text="@string/activate" android:textAlignment="center" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:textColor="#000" android:textSize="18sp" /> </RelativeLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/introduction1" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="36sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/activate_button" android:layout_width="@dimen/activate_button_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/activate_button_size" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/activate_button_margin_top" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white_mod" android:text="@string/activate" app:strokeWidth="5dp" app:strokeColor="#AAA" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/activate_button_size">
<RelativeLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_centerInParent="true" android:text="@string/activate" android:textAlignment="center" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:textColor="#000" android:textSize="18sp" /> </RelativeLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Wallpaper assignment status section --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:alpha="0.7" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Home screen status chip --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/homeStatusCard" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#55FFFFFF" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF">
<TextView android:id="@+id/homeStatusText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_home_inactive" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Lock screen status chip --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/lockStatusCard" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#55FFFFFF" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lockStatusText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_lock_inactive" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</FrameLayout>
